creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 226468
v2

The upstream commit https://invent.kde.org/frameworks/plasma-framework/-/commit/6e53dcc2d25089f35988eacbbfe6e3e189690db4 introduced a change, which makes some of the desktop files no longer being generated.

The updated patch 
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/kf5-5.84.v2.diff
addresses that.


The other three issues (which were unrelated to kf5) have been fixed.


@antoine: all of the listed fallout is therefore fixed.
